scripts.db:debug: node --input-type=module -e "import Database from 'better-sqlite3'; const raw=process.env.DATABASE_URL ?? 'file:./data/blog.db'; const path=raw.startsWith('file:') ? raw.slice(5) : raw; const db=new Database(path,{readonly:true}); const tables=db.prepare('select name from sqlite_master where type=\'table\' and name not like \'sqlite_%\' order by name').all(); console.log('DATABASE_URL=' + raw); console.log('tables=' + (tables.map((t)=>t.name).join(', ') || '(none)')); db.close();"
scripts.db:debug:prod: DATABASE_URL=$(oci secrets secret-bundle get --secret-id "$OCI_DB_SECRET_ID" --query 'data."secret-bundle-content".content' --raw-output | base64 --decode) pnpm run db:debug
